meaning: n.[医]性腺机能减退,生殖官能不良
examples: Objective To improve the standard of diagnosis and treatment of male hypogonadism.
Other symptoms this patient is suffering include kidney failure, liver damage, hallucinations and hypogonadism.
Other terms for so-called male menopause include testosterone deficiency, androgen deficiency of the aging male and late-onset hypogonadism.
Testosterone testing also plays an important role in managing hypogonadism.
